query: SELECT id, poetName, signaturePoem, rarity FROM poetCards WHERE poetName IN ('薛涛', '鱼玄机');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3CY2ATatyDNVhxZ.root --database 4LhGieFmaH5SRJ3NvGaeQq --execute SELECT id, poetName, signaturePoem, rarity FROM poetCards WHERE poetName IN ('薛涛', '鱼玄机');

rows.signaturePoem: 枝迎南北鸟，叶送往来风
易求无价宝，难得有心郎
